name: masv-mcp-server
description: MASV is an easy-to-use, secure, and ultra-reliable cloud-based and on-prem managed file transfer service for large file workflows.
long_description: The MASV MCP Server enables AI assistants to interact with the MASV API. It provides comprehensive tools for package management, portal operations, activity tracking, and integration with cloud storage services and MASV Storage Gateway. MASV is an easy-to-use and ultra-reliable managed file transfer service designed for teams of all sizes. It allows users to send and receive massive files without size limits, while ensuring data integrity and security through its robust cloud infrastructure that supports cloud, on-prem, and hybrid workflows.

masv_team_id.title: MASV Team ID
masv_team_id.description: Your MASV team ID for API authentication

masv_api_key.title: MASV API Key
masv_api_key.description: Your MASV API key for authentication

masv_allow_delete.title: Allow Delete Operations
masv_allow_delete.description: Enable delete operations for packages and portals (use with caution)

tools.name: get_packages
tools.description: Get team packages sent directly to MASV

tools.name: get_package
tools.description: Get package by ID

tools.name: get_portal_packages
tools.description: Get packages uploaded to MASV Portals

tools.name: get_package_files
tools.description: Get list of files in a package

tools.name: get_package_transfers
tools.description: Get all transfers of a package to storage

tools.name: update_package_expiration_date_and_time
tools.description: Update package expiration date and time

tools.name: delete_package
tools.description: Delete a package by ID (requires MASV_ALLOW_DELETE=true)

tools.name: get_activities
tools.description: Get activities (events for packages, links, and transfers)

tools.name: get_activity_events
tools.description: Get history of events for a given activity

tools.name: get_activities_information
tools.description: Get detailed information about all activity types and states

tools.name: get_integrations
tools.description: Get list of connected integrations (AWS S3, Frame.io, etc.)

tools.name: send_package_to_integration
tools.description: Send MASV package to connected integration

tools.name: list_files_on_integration
tools.description: List files on any integration (cloud or MASV Storage Gateway)

tools.name: transfer_files_from_integration
tools.description: Transfer files from integration to MASV

tools.name: get_portals
tools.description: Get list of portals for collecting files from external users

tools.name: get_portal
tools.description: Get a specific portal by ID

tools.name: create_portal
tools.description: Create a new portal for collecting files

tools.name: update_portal
tools.description: Update an existing portal's configuration

tools.name: delete_portal
tools.description: Delete a portal by ID (requires MASV_ALLOW_DELETE=true)

tools.name: get_team_members
tools.description: Get list of all team members
